stemHtml: When compared to icing in stratiform clouds, icing in cumuliform clouds is generally…

options.a: more severe due to the higher supercooled water content of cumuliform cloud.
options.b: less severe due to higher temperatures in cumuliform cloud.
options.c: more severe due to lower temperatures in cumuliform cloud.
options.d: less severe due to the higher supercooled water content of cumuliform cloud.
